goal: 把 capsule export 改成默认链接导出并内置官方 endpoint

summary.title: 让 capsule export 默认生成加密链接
summary.what: 将 CLI 对外入口收敛为 capsule export：默认格式改为 link，只有显式传 --format zip 才生成本地 .capsule.zip；移除 share 子命令；为 official 服务内置 https://agent-capsule.z2z23n0.workers.dev，并保留 CAPSULE_OFFICIAL_ENDPOINT 和 --endpoint 作为覆盖入口。同步更新中英文 README、agent skill 和 Worker 页面提示，并补充 CLI/endpoint 单测。
summary.why: 用户明确要求不要再区分 share/export 两个命令，默认导出就应该是链接，zip 只是显式格式参数；同时官方服务应有代码内置 endpoint，避免裸跑默认命令时因为缺少环境变量而回退 zip。
summary.user_goal: 把 capsule export 改成默认链接导出并内置官方 endpoint

decisions.chose: 只保留 capsule export 作为对外导出入口，默认 --format link，--format zip 才走文件导出。
decisions.rationale: 这样用户和 agent 说导出 session 时会自然得到链接，zip 不再抢占默认语义。
rejected: 继续保留 capsule share 作为推荐命令
保留 export=zip、share=link 的双入口语义

decisions.chose: 把 https://agent-capsule.z2z23n0.workers.dev 作为 official 的内置默认 endpoint，CAPSULE_OFFICIAL_ENDPOINT 和 --endpoint 只做覆盖。
decisions.rationale: 默认 official 服务名必须能解析到真实上传目标，否则默认 link 会因为配置缺失而降级成 zip。

decisions.chose: 检查 proposed intent int_d4e31ace 后确认它只是 README/license 开源化说明，本次 README 改动是 CLI 行为文档更新，不构成语义冲突。
decisions.rationale: 两个 intent 共享 README 文件，但目标和具体行为面不同。

review_notes: 验证：deploy/cloudflare-worker 下 npm test 通过。
验证：go run ./cmd/capsule help 不再展示 capsule share；go run ./cmd/capsule share 返回 unknown command。
本次没有运行 make test，遵守仓库约定。

architectural_claims: The public CLI export path now routes through the link-capable Share flow rather than the zip-only Export flow.
The internal zip Export function remains as the implementation behind --format zip and fallback zip behavior.
behavioral_changes: capsule export --thread current now defaults to encrypted link upload through the official service.
capsule export --thread current --format zip creates the local .capsule.zip file path.
capsule share is no longer a supported CLI subcommand.
official link exports use the built-in hosted Worker endpoint unless an explicit endpoint or CAPSULE_OFFICIAL_ENDPOINT override is provided.
README and agent skill now teach export as the single default handoff command.
security_implications: Default export now uploads encrypted capsule data to the hosted official Worker endpoint when link export succeeds.
CAPSULE_OFFICIAL_ENDPOINT remains available for local development or service migration overrides.
The decryption key remains in the URL fragment and is not sent to the Worker by normal browser requests.
migration_notes: Scripts using capsule share must switch to capsule export.
Scripts expecting capsule export to write a zip by default must add --format zip.
